data.body: CHECKPOINT: Fix applied. Root cause: compute_diff_hash_excludes_file() called bash compute-diff-hash.sh twice per file (hash_before + hash_after), for a total of ~20 subprocess invocations across 10 tests. Each cold-path invocation was slow (~3-7s) due to (a) config-paths.sh spawning 6 read-config.sh subprocesses, (b) checkpoint walk (10 git log + rev-parse calls), and (c) no cache hits since staging/unstaging changes the index mtime between calls. Fix: (1) pre-compute BASELINE_HASH once after git init, reuse across all tests; (2) export WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE to skip git-based config resolution in each call; (3) export WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR to skip get_artifacts_dir overhead. Result: test now completes in ~25s (down from >73s timeout).
